inputs.label: Measurement System
inputs.businessContext: 0 = Metric (kg, cm), 1 = Imperial (stones, pounds, feet, inches)

businessContext_i18n.en: 0 = Metric (kg, cm), 1 = Imperial (stones, pounds, feet, inches)
businessContext_i18n.tr: 0 = Metrik (kg, cm), 1 = İmparatorluk (stone, pound, fit, inç)
businessContext_i18n.de: 0 = Metrisch (kg, cm), 1 = Imperial (Steine, Pfund, Fuß, Zoll)
businessContext_i18n.fr: 0 = Métrique (kg, cm), 1 = Impérial (stones, livres, pieds, pouces)
businessContext_i18n.es: 0 = Métrico (kg, cm), 1 = Imperial (stones, libras, pies, pulgadas)
businessContext_i18n.ar: 0 = متري (كجم، سم)، 1 = إمبراطوري (حجر، رطل، قدم، بوصة)

inputs.label: Weight (kg)
inputs.businessContext: Body weight in kilograms, used when Metric system selected

businessContext_i18n.en: Body weight in kilograms, used when Metric system selected
businessContext_i18n.tr: Vücut ağırlığı (kg), Metrik sistem seçildiğinde kullanılır
businessContext_i18n.de: Körpergewicht in Kilogramm, verwendet bei metrischem System
businessContext_i18n.fr: Poids corporel en kilogrammes, utilisé avec le système métrique
businessContext_i18n.es: Peso corporal en kilogramos, usado cuando se selecciona el sistema métrico
businessContext_i18n.ar: وزن الجسم بالكيلوجرام، يُستخدم عند اختيار النظام المتري
